zh.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln於1598年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根阿爾騰特盧丁根。她於大約1620年與Caspar Körner在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根阿爾騰特盧丁根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1655年10月27日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根享年57歲，埋葬在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln于1598年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根阿爾騰特盧丁根。她于大约1620年与Caspar Körner在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根阿爾騰特盧丁根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1655年10月27日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根享年57岁，埋葬在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 安斯巴赫瓦薩特盧丁根。

nameMeanings.name: Uln
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from the city of this name in Baden-Württemberg. The placename is from the root uel, an unattested word meaning ‘turn, wind, roll’, or from el- or ol- ‘flow’, a reference in either case to the influx of the Blan river into the Danube.
from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal name Odolmar (see Ulmer 2). Compare Ollom , Ullom , Ullum , Wollam , and Woolam .

variants.name: Wollam
meanings: English (Shropshire and Lancashire): variant of the Devon surname Woolland, perhaps a habitational name from Woolland in Dorset, named from Old English wynne ‘pasture, meadow’ + land ‘land’. Alternatively, but less likely, a topographic name from Middle English wough ‘bent, crooked’ + land(e), lond(e) ‘land’ (Old English wōh + land), perhaps denoting a person who lived at or near a bend in a stream or river, or for someone from any place so named, such as Wollensbrook in Great Amwell (Hertfordshire). This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Ulmer
meanings: habitational name for someone from the city of Ulm (see   Ulm   1).
from the ancient Germanic personal name Odolmar, composed of the elements odal ‘inherited property’ + mār ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln was born in 1598, in Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany. She married Caspar Körner about 1620, in Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 27 October 1655, in Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 57, and was buried in Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln est née en 1598, à Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne. Elle a épousé Caspar Körner environ 1620, à Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 octobre 1655, à Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln wurde 1598 in Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland geboren. Sie hat um 1620 in Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland Caspar Körner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Oktober 1655 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln è nata il nel 1598 nel Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania. Lei sposato Caspar Körner circa 1620, nel Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 27 ottobre 1655, nel Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Ulnは1598年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチワセルトルuディンジェンアルテントルuディンジェンで生まれた。約1620年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチワセルトルuディンジェンアルテントルuディンジェンでCaspar Körnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1655年10月27日にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチワセルトルuディンジェンで57歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス アンスバチワセルトルuディンジェンにて埋葬された。

ko.Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach: 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 와세르트u딩 알텐트u딩
ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln(은)는 1598년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 와세르트u딩 알텐트u딩에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1620년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 와세르트u딩 알텐트u딩에서 Caspar Körner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1655년 10월 27일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 와세르트u딩에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 앤스바치 와세르트u딩에 묻혔다.

pt.Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach: Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln nasceu em 1598, em Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha. Ela casou-se com Caspar Körner aproximadamente 1620, em Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de outubro de 1655, em Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Ansbach: алтентрuдинген, вассиртрuдинген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln родилась в 1598 г. в местности алтентрuдинген, вассиртрuдинген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Caspar Körner около 1620 г. в местности алтентрuдинген, вассиртрuдинген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 27 октября 1655 г. в местности вассиртрuдинген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности вассиртрuдинген, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Anna Maria Uln nació en 1598, en Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania. Se casó con Caspar Körner aproximadamente 1620, en Altentrüdingen, Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de octubre de 1655, en Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Wassertrüdingen, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania.
